subcodes.first_line: The Dayspring of Revelation hath found Himself amidst a people of iniquity, wherefore do all things lament, yet the people understand not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد امسی مطلع الظهور بین اهل الفجور و بذلک ینوح الاشیاء ولکن الناس هم لایفقهون
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
